P0R03242: The SCPN resolves the Mind-Body Problem via Hierarchical Field Monism (HFM). The fundamental reality is the Psi-Field. Mind and Matter are emergent modalities of the field's dynamics, interfaced hierarchically via information.

source_formulae: P0R03245: VI. Formalising Emergence: Phase Transitions and Ginzburg-Landau Theory
P0R03246: The emergence of higher-order structures (e.g., L5 Self) is formalised as a phase transition using Ginzburg-Landau (GL) theory.
P0R03247: The Free Energy density (f) near the critical point (TC) is:

P0R03249: When T<TC, the system undergoes Spontaneous Symmetry Breaking (SSB), acquiring a non-zero VEV (=0), generating the stable structure. TC depends on the noise and coupling strength of the underlying network (UPDE).
